scored_hypotheses.claim: The manuscript's text structure reflects a single, coherent narrative.

test_result.test: claude_evaluation
test_result.details: The Zipf exponent fit supports coherence, but the 70.1% hapax ratio contradicts expectations for a single coherent narrative; such high word uniqueness suggests artificial or highly specialized structure rather than continuous narrative prose.
